project.name: Lens
project.summary: Lens is a TypeScript-first real-time API framework with automatic live queries, minimal diff updates, transport adapters, storage adapters, and framework bindings.
goals: Own the Lens server executor, client transports, framework bindings, storage adapters, examples, docs, and npm package release path.
Keep every-query-is-live semantics, minimal diff updates, type-safe field selection, and multi-server routing coherent across packages.
Keep TypeScript as the schema source of truth without required SDL or code generation.
nonGoals: Own product applications' domain models, databases, auth policies, or deployment paths.
Introduce GraphQL SDL/codegen as a required public source of truth without a new ADR.
Put customer-specific or hosted-service assumptions into core framework packages.

owns.name: real-time-api-framework
owns.description: Core query, mutation, live-query, resolver, diffing, transport, storage, and framework-binding packages.

owns.name: lens-package-release
owns.description: Build, test, lint, and npm release workflow for the Lens package family.

doesNotOwn: Downstream product apps' domain models, databases, auth policies, deployment paths, or customer-specific behavior.
External hosted realtime providers except through documented adapter packages.

allowedDependencies.surface: public package dependency for optimistic/declarative entity operations
public package dependency for standard entity definitions

forbiddenCouplings: Do not add product-specific backend assumptions to Lens core, server, transport, storage, or framework packages.
Do not require SDL/codegen as a parallel source of truth for public Lens APIs.
Do not publish package changes without CI, release workflow evidence, and npm registry readback.

delivery.deployPath: Main push runs the central reusable release workflow to publish changed Lens npm packages.
delivery.productionProof: Build & Test, Lint, release workflow completion, generated changelog/version evidence, and npm package readback for changed packages.

packageRelease.releaseIntent: Package changes are released from main by the central reusable release workflow; formal Changesets adoption is not yet declared in this repo.
packageRelease.versionPr: Version/changelog ownership is delegated to the reusable release workflow at adoption time.
packageRelease.publisher: SylphxAI/.github reusable release workflow with inherited repository secrets.
packageRelease.publishProof: npm package readback for each changed @sylphx/lens* package.

gaps.description: CI uses repo-local legacy Build & Test and Lint contexts rather than ADR-29 stable fan-in contexts.
Package release workflow does not expose repo-local Changesets release intent at adoption time.
